office_does: The prosecutor directs criminal prosecution, provides county legal advice, and supports victims and law enforcement.
race_blurb: Appointed prosecutor Jason Walker faces chief criminal deputy Daniel Crawford.

candidates.summary: Crawford is chief criminal deputy prosecutor and campaigns on aggressive prosecution of violent, repeat, drug, domestic-abuse, and property offenders.
highlights: Supports aggressive prosecution and victim and law-enforcement backing [S2].

safety.basis: Aggressive prosecution of violent and repeat offenders directly favors enforcement.

experience.basis: Chief-deputy prosecutorial service provides a substantial professional record.

candidates.summary: Walker is the appointed prosecutor and former chief criminal deputy who has opposed pretrial-rule changes on enforcement grounds.
highlights: Serves as appointed prosecutor after long chief-deputy tenure [S2][S3].

safety.basis: His official opposition to pretrial-rule changes is based on enforcement and case-disposition concerns.

experience.basis: Appointed incumbency and long chief-deputy service provide an established prosecutorial record.
